h41714ba1gebd2g4385ga494g31d5f5ae9776: I can't say I've ever been bought before - how much did I fetch?
ha3d7d0c6gdafag4bb1gbd5ag1ea9377fa7ab: No, don't tell me. There is nothing so depressing as learning one's true value.
hbb98854ag7ac5g4184g8b36ge04e15dd2978: Well, you should at least know what you've paid for. I am the Oskar Fevras, at your service.
h95bebe22g695ag47f4g8012g0c7673add560: An affliction for which you cannot be faulted, this far from civilization.
h9a2b28f8g2343g4135ga992g327a59ac46a0: But my patron will be most grateful for your heroics. My betrothed, I should say.
h56d8b766g0823g4501ga441gb92af81f2534: A genuine pleasure. I'm in your debt - as is my patron. My betrothed, I should say.
h7c6113b0g4881g4f52g99adg6a045daf8039: Assuming Lady Jannath still wishes to marry after our little... falling out.
h53bf2e8bgdf31g4604g8b78g62355969ac36: *You recall a recent scandal - a patriar of Baldur's Gate who wished to marry a commoner.*
hee229becg0b5fg446cgbca6g88e211d85aed: I did not run away - a date was never set. There were... complications.
h76c69737g7504g4c2cg8b1fg84d80fd09770: Before my fame, my patron, there was... another woman. One I planned to spend my life with.
hcca2b527g4104g4959ga974g6703b202a982: But when Lady Jannath offered me a future, well... it felt only right to mention my past.
hab1e4035gfd81g4e86ga9e6g74fbbf9bde58: Right, but unwise. I was forced to retreat into the countryside. To paint, and clear my head. To choose, I suppose.
h0fc4c866g30bcg448fg8316g07de00871aa0: Indeed - one to split the very soul. But I dare not dwell on it any longer lest I weep.
h87848a29ga537g4e74g8701gd1a8964d6c54: And we have your reward to consider - once I have made my way safely back to the city.
h10c47a8ag4fc5g4d31g8d0aged28d8a63967: I saw your paintings - were they portraits of the women you spoke of?
h20d51d33g6c27g4d64gb7e4gbe46996c5220: Indeed. I thought the canvas would make clear what my heart could not.
h81bcd8b1gfd0fg48f8g8217gaf27498d032c: Both turned out masterpieces, more's the pity. Not a stray brushstroke between them.
hbb4715fegc7f0g49afg94ecgb7fb15241e51: They're yours, if you can find use for them - in the privy perhaps. I had best get moving.
he0cc1d4cg0d0cg47f4g92f9g63c9252ca665: Say - I don't suppose you could spare some coin, could you? Ease the discomforts of the road some?
hf1dfd455ge449g42d2ga1b9gf685c019c6a5: A hero to the hilt. Seek me out in the city, truly - beneath my brush, you'll live forever.
hece9a8dcge475g4e41gbe6cgca103875187b: I've already spent enough coin on you.
h802a8d01ge271g48d6gb515ge24e680177f8: I suppose I can endure the walk sober. Suffering has become an old friend, after all.
he38ba227g0a69g478egaf4fg2888e695dff6: Coin will just weigh you down. Get moving.
h1a1043fagdf70g4bc5g9312gf68938d3308b: I'll give you a serious discomfort to deal with if you don't get going. Now.
hadca12aeg8602g4f08g9577gc6ef6ed81293: Right you are, just asking for a little help was all...
habeb16a0gf498g42b6ga294g53ba67356180: Then I congratulate you - tear them up and they'll be most useful in the privy.
he6df4d2eg316eg454ag8d0ag2f0d69e6b479: I thought the canvas would make clear what my heart could not. Drivel.
h69e6275egf56eg4d31ga200gddf45691a3a3: Now, if you cared to spare some coins in exchange, well. That would ease the discomforts of the road some.
h4718ad01ga325g4989g8876g75464889f2be: I hope you came to a decision - the paintings are gone.
h550ca0d7g9dccg4982gba49gc4d19544ad9f: Wadded up to wipe Zhentish arses, I expect - and good riddance.
h836f4dd1g7d57g4e2dg9b93g21f7f728c3bb: Their objective perfection is what caught these bastards' eyes to begin with. Now that I'm free...
hb680fdcfg3effg46f9g8e75g04275e303fe1: And what choice did you make?
h78396441gc774g4b87g8731ga48158f84581: Hm? Oh, absolutely none. Fame and wealth suit me very well, no doubt.
h860a2d26gf58cg42f4ga6f0g5176e362ba29: And yet I think of that first love, and... I hesitate. Likely I'm going mad.
h4d01bfd2g048ag428ega0e2g8f4de1e1c494: Regardless! We have more immediate concerns - your reward once I've returned to the city, for one.
h76605044gf4a9g417bg9edaga95e66f20861: All I care about is getting paid.
h32dd6423ga040g4fc4gb3a8gc47577bf9749: I wish I could harden my heart so. Still, you're right - we have the matter of my return to consider.
h9769f2a0g0df2g42ddg8232gd0ed1ebb40b7: Assuming Lady Jannath still wishes to marry after our little... falling out.
h59ebe285gd39eg4345ga465g572af045758d: She offered me a future, and so in a fit of madness I told her of my past.
h88c2a83cg8d6bg491cg81beg70f6b5609167: Of the woman I'd loved before she found me. Love still, in truth. She was... less than pleased.
hd9ccebc3g26b8g495cg95f7ga071f5f1ac37: I made a timely retreat into the countryside. To paint, and clear my head. To choose, I suppose.
h1c219cf6g622fg431fgb31cgc12f38f970db: A noblewoman of passion, refinement and, as it turns out, quite ferocious temper.
h38ac9656g2c46g4d3dg8ddag44a31c76376c: The latter I learned only after the engagement, when I told her I was still in love with someone else.
h0118e613g032bg4e8agb148gd54e8ac4e2a4: I don't care about your love life - I just want my reward.
h80728168gf150g401cgba83ga820661d1f04: Ah. Right. Suit yourself - find me in the city and you shall have your reward.
h963bbea4gba44g40dfg8b8fg4b98bc98509b: Say - you couldn't spare a little coin, could you? Ease the discomforts of the road some?
hc3163c3bgaf1eg426bgaa9dgcb9579f154d6: My slaves do not speak until they are spoken to.
hc6542524g23b2g4825ga97bgf860142bb391: Ha! Quite. Well, now that... wait, you're not serious?
h17e8deadge3c8g46c4gb15eg3f6a0ef75558: I don't make jokes with my slaves.
hd4151335g05c3g401dg8ff8g9bac4de02583: Indeed. I'll just... carry your things then, shall I? Scrub your boots? Just one moment.
h3835560egda6ag488bg8625g742b4b3d5c31: You can SHOVE your boots where even Lathander can't light - I'm no-one's slave!
h305bd1ebgda33g4074g9dcfg525cdc506562: Of course I'm not. Just teasing.
h64eac735gd6eag43e8g9547g9361da893c35: Droll. Fear not, I'll ensure you're compensated once I return to my patron. My betrothed, I should say.
h86237620gafadg463dga600ge8968523899b: Excellent. When will I get my reward?
hb6ccb1c6g7287g41e8g9b81g7d429b4c1a31: Fear not, friend! My patron will make good on all my debts. My betrothed, I should say.
hfa268ca1gcc07g4ed1gbe1cgd4d832cd73c3: Don't worry, 'the Oskar Fevras' didn't cost me a single coin.
h37524371g8a2ag4528ga730g204dea3e6c98: ... do you know, of all the indignities heaped upon me in this place, that might well be the worst.
hfa1f6110g65d9g48f8gbd1dg81990dd7ee1f: It seems you've made quite the profit. My patron will see you rewarded - my betrothed, I should say.
hd98350edg084eg4eedg8632g48ae196dc9d4: What will you do with your freedom?
h5d9eab33g9f91g4934gb0c5gbb6975cab84d: Oh - run crying back to my patron I expect. My betrothed, I should say.
h5289d68bg72f0g46aeg84ceg79556a87f720: I can't say I've ever been bought before - how much did I fetch?
hf1d19a6bgc2d8g405cg9f3cgd4887adff9a3: Gods above, man - I said buy me. If you didn't have the coin, you might have just said.
h2646ae78g8c2fg4858gb05bgd712b0150fda: Gods above, woman - I said buy me. If you didn't have the coin, you might have just said.
h944503f0gf7e2g4c73gae1dg1cb44f19a3ff: Wait, WAIT! I'm just a prisoner - spare me and there'll be coin, I swear it!
hb659c6d2gb46dg444ag88d6g4d283c8134d0: In any case, I am a slave no longer - and your money troubles are over, rest assured. For you have saved none other than Oskar Fevras.
hef223e92ga6f1g4de6g9e7fg71922dd4da76: I'm an artist. These faithless bastards were trying to ransom me back to my patron.
hcf7ff5e2gfcdbg4832g828fg51e180c8d73d: She's a woman of great means - and great generosity to those who serve her well.
h76f2a606g9f20g47f2gae94gc57e393e2c42: Heroes who rescue her prize painter, for example. Oskar Fevras, at your service.
had364daegb01bg4bceg9652gca99cb7dd36f: Oh, thank the gods - if it's wealth you seek then you've done yourself a great service, friend.
haa36c13eg74d1g4badgab8eg22b0f230743c: For you've rescued none other than the artist Oskar Fevras.
hcdcb1adcg1530g402ega641g427dcfdd6f20: Oh, thank the gods. You may not know it, friend, but you've just done yourself a great service indeed.
h0506e885gcac8g47f4g81c8gae08cc7b2244: Oi! Leave him be, yeah? You've got an appointment with Zarys - and she don't like waiting.
he6a5b16fg2435g44ccg91c7g3f4660e850c3: I'm far too busy to speak. Goodbye!
ha5b62aacg698cg4b63g9806gdb4789549f4c: Why do you think I'm going to die?
h53d5d7bagbd22g4366ga9a1g15e896f61c17: Look, whatever you planned with Rugan, they know. Be ready for anything.
hcaaa977cg1a6bg4070g8ca7g3be257219cbb: *His eyes are glassy, and he is sweating profusely - absolutely terrified, but pretending all is well.*
h8ea96ef3gb8e6g4493ga61fg284f01e9a41e: *There's little to discern- aside from his obvious desire to be left alone.*
hd39def9bg883dg4ac6g9593g866b5b4fab1b: Relax. I'm just here to trade.
hf5cb3e13gac6dg4e88gbb24ga58f80134b76: No, not trade - trap. Prove you're more useful alive.
h84fba93agc1b5g409dgbeb1gd083c4002f3e: Quite. Now I really do have to get back to work!
h67e849a2ge78dg4f9ag88b0ga570d7c3c441: Excuse me, but I really am far too busy.
h76c0eef5g5843g445fg9addgbc2b99f25e34: It's pure savagery, to keep a prisoner parched like this. They'll only offer me water.
h89e03bebg1428g4d0cgb6b2gc0ba5993467d: Your jailor is dead - you're free to go.
hbaab130ag9172g4291g9c2cg3b03fdf7f752: He's what? Pardon... I won't miss him. But Brem was about as reasonable as these thugs get.
h27079a89gb7fbg4a45gacddgba4a7600fffc: He might've let me go, for the right amount of coin. The rest? They'll only be swayed by steel.
h930a1cfcgeeb7g4dafg90f5ge792ae65943a: I rather suspected I'd die in a sunless hole. Just not this one.
h0cc3d5a0g1d65g48a7g8efcgba64200fc187: Oh, my friend. There are far more interesting folk to speak to here.
he6228941g3bfcg42e0g8300g66f4b4088deb: You! Zarys may have welcomed you, but I can see you're not one of her thugs.
hec6785d2ga4b0g49e2g8e79gb9f0c2cd4010: I am not some lower city coinlad offering you a tumble. I am an artist.
hdf8df69fg3abag45f5gb86cg0ce6869838d3: And my patron will reward you for my rescue - tenfold whatever ransom you pay, I guarantee it.
he7ac1e3cg0eb1g4ce8g8c95g27e1f2ec6ce6: Then it is well I am asking you to serve only yourself.
h69bba232gbf29g4ee5gbbe4g69f947ef7d49: For the return of her prize artist, my patron will measure her gratitude in gold.
h6bc0350fg8264g4fcagb059g165903a2b65d: Tenfold whatever ransom these clods try to squeeze from you, I guarantee it.
h34863354g863fg4e15g9970ge99128c831ba: As far as you're concerned she may as well be the Coinmaiden herself.
he1857677ge0bfg4600g9c63gae2303acad74: But there will be time for questions later. Please, speak to Brem - I need to see the sun again.
h6648149fg2dffg4cccgb057gbd412206063e: I'll see how much they're asking for you.
h58e3c923g6671g4a6bgab50g433c0287ecc8: I hope you have means - these Zhent have seen my work. They won't let me go cheaply.
h33536c4dgd117g479fga083g24bcbf2b756b: Please, speak to Brem. I need to see the sun again.
haeeaec33ged3eg4350g9bd6g8de3f6a4c675: Forget it. I just want you to paint my portrait.
h24409141g5efdg4bf3gb686g84f38120dce0: Forgive me, but I can't think down here. Can't work. Free me, and you will have your portrait.
h39edbad4gf395g4e8dg9234g06801665caa1: One so grand that even blind Tyr himself will weep to see it - but first, speak to Brem. Please.
h0cb57f92gd961g4075gb045gf4108e3dec3c: I doubt you're worth the asking price.
h79048a28gc68dg491aga1f8g43674f57238a: Fine - as well as a mere fortune, I will offer you something far greater: a painting by my own hand.
h1ad2c51dgaea9g419dgbacegf544c74aee20: I'll make of you a portrait so grand that even blind Tyr will weep in its very presence.
h16c1fedag54d7g4f4ag97dbg2f79a6c9b283: Just as soon as I'm back in the city. Please, speak to Brem - I need to see the sun again.
he53cd21eg0384g460ag9dd0g7f0eaaf16f65: This ransom is your patron's problem - not mine.
h89fa3cbcg6cfdg430dg8da4g65ccf53d0da0: And when my corpse is being picked at by dogs, I suppose it won't be your problem then either?
h318f3186g6162g46d8gaccfgbd7e41efbbd4: I took you for a better sort than these. Leave me to my chains, then.
h95e0f65bgc43dg4bbbg89b4g3e8fa10bca10: Sure - how much do you cost?
h42d8e3b1gcbfeg441bg96a4ga9fc88a9f366: You were... rather quick to agree. But all the wiser for it.
h75a1a450gea29g4a7eg8bf3g51052d2cc4d2: Maybe. But you don't look very expensive.
h7e870c7cg8523g44ecg8811g6dc407341f53: Not to you, perhaps - but those of actual taste might disagree.
h7bb0348bg97d8g4382g9f64g0e2fc0a71568: Buy you? I'm just here to have my potrait painted.
h90413961g2e6fg4658g8125g6342d449df83: You... oh. Another of Brem's bloody commissions? I will not sully my brush with every ugly vagrant who -
h28b78d6cg2236g4b9cg9a36gc20a21d864d1: Forgive me, I just... I'm here against my will, you see? But I know my patron is looking.
hefa94faeg7875g4bd9g84a3gf1499710a2aa: She will be most grateful to whoever can secure my release. And most generous, I know it.
h0421a760gd357g493dgb3a3gc359b3e5d942: You! The way you handled Zarys - you're not one of her thugs.
hb2bdbbe3g0333g4a96g9ca1g7d064cdb57ce: What - come to kill me yourself? You might as well.
h6d9625d1gbfeeg4dbdgb339g61f951a913fe: Relax - I'll speak to your captors.
hbde3d5bfg2722g42bfgb9f5g70d2539eef61: Now I don't mean to hurry you - but if you could hurry, I'd be most obliged.
h67c51a99g54f2g462cgae94g45ad065dc6d8: You've spoken to Brem? He'll let me go free?
hb5dfb934gfef6g4659gb0a9g90336255e537: I've got enough problems without adding you to the list.
h2ed5703bgaf8ag4181gadc4g5f172d25fac9: Not yet. I'm working on it.
h143c380eg6f84g4c74gbe83gd3d6e37d1daa: Of course. I don't mean to rush you.
h00a5344cgafb6g418bg9beag2ae0bab33b2b: I'm sure we have plenty of time before they work me to death.
